description_long: This is a tactical-style axe featuring a robust, black handle with a segmented, ergonomic grip designed for secure handling. The handle appears to be made of a synthetic or composite material, possibly reinforced with metal for added strength. The axe head is angular and modern, with a wide, flat blade on one side and a sharply pointed pick on the opposite side, both crafted from dark metal. The blade has cut-out sections, likely for weight reduction and aesthetic appeal, and the pick end is tapered for piercing. There is a visible label or marking near the base of the handle, adding a functional or branding detail. The overall design suggests durability and utility, suitable for urban rescue, breaching, or heavy-duty tasks.
description: A modern tactical axe with a black segmented handle and a dual-purpose head featuring a wide blade and a pointed pick, designed for strength and utility.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide blade with cut-outs and the pointed pick, as well as the ergonomic handle and visible label near the base.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the length of the handle, the thickness of the axe head, and the angular transition between blade and pick.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the pointed pick in full, the back of the handle, and the symmetrical design of the axe head.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the handle's segmented grip and the blade's flat, broad surface with cut-outs.
attribute_handle_type: Curved, segmented synthetic or composite handle with ergonomic grip features and a rectangular cross-section.
attribute_blade_design: Angular, modern blade with a wide flat edge, cut-out sections for weight reduction, and a sharply pointed pick on the opposite side.
attribute_mounting_style: Modern composite mounting, likely molded or integrated with the handle for strength.
attribute_visible_markings_or_labels: QR code label near handle base
